problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to and, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
